generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired civil defense coordinator, I've seen firsthand how vital preparedness is for national security. The current administration's cuts to local emergency response funding put us all at risk. We can't afford to wait until disaster strikes - our communities need reliable support systems NOW. #CivilDefenseMatters #NationalSecurityFirst
